# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: microservice-a
spec:
  serviceAccountName: microservice-a-sa
  ports:
  - port: 80
    protocol: HTTP
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: microservice-b
spec:
  serviceAccountName: microservice-b-sa
  ports:
  - port: 80
    protocol: HTTP
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServiceAuthorization
metadata:
  name: zero-trust-policy
spec:
  rules:
  - allow:
    - from:
        kind: ServiceAccount
        name: microservice-a-sa
    - to:
        kind: Service
        name: microservice-b
    ports:
    - port: 80
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServiceAuthorization
metadata:
  name: zero-trust-policy
spec:
  rules:
  - allow:
    - from:
        kind: Service
        name: microservice-b
    - to:
        kind: Service
        name: microservice-a
    ports:
    - port: 80
